data.title: Write RED tests for hook_record_skill_attribution and post-skill.sh dispatch
data.description: Create tests/hooks/test-post-skill-attribution.sh with two failing tests: test_hook_record_skill_attribution_writes_jsonl_entry_when_enabled() and test_post_skill_dispatcher_appends_skill_entry_to_jsonl(). Fresh subshells required. TDD exemption: test-writing task.
